_comment: Inputs for H1 (Toroidal Magnetism) verification. H1 is a plausibility sketch — the only genuinely runnable checks are dimensional. Other 'qualitative passes' (right-hand rule, monopole absence) are topological/geometric arguments, not computations.

J_g_units.source: graviton current density — mass flux per area per time; defined in theory/versions/gcm_v2.md H2

div_J_g_units.source: divergence of J_g; charge-proxy in GCM

product_units.source: (div J_g) * v — force per unit volume; derived in claim.md/derivation.md

tesla_units.source: SI definition of magnetic field; derivation via F = qvB
